Container.Name: NASearch
Container.Overview:
Lightweight file search UI for your Unraid array. Uses plocate to index your files and serves a fast browser-based search interface with previews for images, video, audio, PDF, and text files. Supports inline download, folder zip, and optional HTTP Basic Auth. No Elasticsearch, no Node, no build step.
IMPORTANT: You must set either AUTH_USER + AUTH_PASS (recommended) or NOAUTH=true before the app will start.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the NASearch web interface.

Config.Name: Array Path
Config.Description: Root of your Unraid array, mounted read-only. NASearch will index and serve files from here.

Config.Name: Index & Config Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the plocate database and settings.json.

Config.Name: Auth Username
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth username. Set both AUTH_USER and AUTH_PASS to enable authentication (recommended).

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: HTTP Basic Auth password. Set both AUTH_USER and AUTH_PASS to enable authentication (recommended).

Config.Name: Disable Auth
Config.Description: Set to 'true' to explicitly disable authentication. Only use on a fully trusted, firewalled network. Either AUTH_USER+AUTH_PASS or NOAUTH=true must be set.

Config.Name: Prune Paths
Config.Description: Space-separated list of paths to skip during indexing.

Config.Name: Max Results
Config.Description: Maximum number of search results returned per query.
